creator: wyy_tw@yahoo.com.tw
text: My freebsd os is 9.3 . I run portsnap fetch and extract and update . I cd /usr/ports/lang/per15.16 and #make install clean . It shows "/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk" line 1038: Unknown directive . make:fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue . Could anyone help me ? thank you
